careersPage.heroTitle: Join Lapla — Build Vietnam's Green Future
careersPage.heroSubtitle: We are looking for passionate people who love the outdoors, take pride in their craft, and want to grow with a company that is reshaping Vietnam's landscape industry.
careersPage.cultureSubtitle: Dynamic work environment, clear career development paths, and a team that celebrates craft.
careersPage.card1Text: Structured training, site rotations, and mentorship from senior engineers and designers.
careersPage.card2Text: Market-rate salary, performance bonuses, health insurance, and project completion incentives.
careersPage.card3Text: Collaborative site teams, open management culture, and company events that bring everyone together.
careersPage.positionsSubtitle: We hire year-round. Submit your CV even if your role isn't listed.
careersPage.applySubtitle: Fill in the form below and our HR team will get back to you within 3 business days.

servicesPage.heroSubtitle: From concept to long-term care — Lapla delivers every phase of a world-class landscape project
servicesPage.finalCtaSubtitle: Tell us about your vision — Lapla will handle everything from design to delivery.

about.heroSubtitle: From a small flower import business to Vietnam's leading full-service landscape contractor
about.overviewDescription: LAPLA – Grass & Tree Landscape is a leading and trusted company in landscape design and construction in Vietnam. We provide full-service solutions from design, construction, and green supply to landscape maintenance for resorts, urban developments, and premium real estate.
about.specializationValue: Landscape design & build, golf courses, resort greenery, urban development
about.visionValue: To become the leading enterprise in sustainable green landscape solutions — creating living spaces in harmony with nature, architecture, and people.
about.valueDesignText: Every project balances aesthetics, function, and local ecology.
about.valueSustainText: ISO-aligned practices, responsible sourcing, and long-term ecological thinking.
about.valuePartnerText: We grow alongside clients — from groundbreaking through ongoing care.
about.leadershipSubtitle: Experienced professionals driving Lapla's vision forward
about.ctaSubtitle: From concept to completion — Lapla delivers full-service landscape solutions tailored to your vision.
